features.name: class definition inside generate loop
features.description: Code should include a class definition placed inside a generate for loop to test generate-scoped class declarations

features.name: virtual interface class with pure virtual task
features.description: Code should include a virtual class (interface class) with a pure virtual task declaration for testing abstract method inheritance

features.name: class extending virtual class in generate loop
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a virtual class, defined inside a generate loop, for testing polymorphic class instantiation

features.name: xmr to generated block from class method
features.description: Code should include cross-module reference to a generated block instance accessed from within a class method, testing XMR path resolution in generated contexts

features.name: dynamic class instance storage in array
features.description: Code should include an array of virtual class handles that store dynamically created class instances for polymorphism testing
